craft.title: Brew the Philosopher's Stone (Mass Accumulate ritual)

subtitle.text: To obtain, something of equal value must be lost.

description: The first Vessel. The Stone that breaks equivalent exchange , because its price is paid by souls that did not agree to pay.
The Path to Divinity scroll encodes the Homunculus chain, the 999-soul Mass Accumulate the Nightwarden's lineage left behind.
You know what it is. You know what paid for it. You make it anyway , because the alternative is not finishing the journey.
